title: Cookie Parser
description: Paste a Cookie / Set-Cookie header → structured table of all attributes (Domain / Path / Expires / SameSite …) with security & privacy warnings. Fully local.

localOnly.title: Local-only parsing
localOnly.description: All parsing happens in your browser — cookie contents are never uploaded.

input.setCookiePlaceholder:
sid=abc123; Path=/; Domain=example.com; Secure; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict
foo=bar; Path=/api; Max-Age=3600

results.empty: Nothing yet — paste above or pick a sample.

warnings.sameSiteNoneRequiresSecure: SameSite=None requires Secure — browsers will reject otherwise.
warnings.tokenShouldBeHttpOnly: Looks like a session token; add HttpOnly to defend against XSS theft.
warnings.alreadyExpired: Expires is in the past — the browser will drop this cookie immediately.
warnings.noDomainHostOnly: No Domain attribute — cookie is host-only, subdomains won't see it.
